briefdescription.para: Map GPIO signal name to devicetree binding.

detaileddescription.para: RTS5912 documentation uses octal GPIO pin numbering. These macros do not require the user to do the transfer for gpio.

briefdescription.para: Set pin at the default voltage level.
Set pin voltage level at 1.8 V.
Set pin voltage level at 3.3 V.
Set pin voltage level at 5.0 V.
Interrupt Mask since rts5912 does not support GPIO_INT_LEVELS_LOGICAL.
